summary: You must be 13+ years old to use OneQ
Journal entries are stored locally on your device
You retain ownership of all your content
Subscription payments are processed by Apple
Auto-renewal can be turned off in your Apple ID settings
The app is not a substitute for professional mental health care
We may update these terms with notice through the app
Your journal entries are stored locally on your device
Optional iCloud backup can sync entries across your devices
We collect minimal usage data to improve the app
We don't sell your personal data to third parties
You can export or delete your data at any time
You can disable analytics in settings
